DialogCompound

Modal dialog overlay with header, body text, and footer buttons. Supports dismiss, primary, secondary, and tertiary actions.

DefaultWith TertiaryNo BodyNo Dismiss
Are you sure you want to proceed?

Static Variants

Default
Main question or action

Here is more about the consequences of the main action, if details are needed.

With Tertiary Button
Confirm important action

This will affect your entire workspace. Please review before confirming.

No Body
Discard unsaved changes?
No Dismiss / No Secondary
Session expired

Your session has timed out. Please sign in again to continue.
